texto: This is how it works. I love the people in my life, and I do for my friends whatever they need me to do for them, again and again, as many times as is necessary. For example, in your case you always forgot who you are and how much you're loved. So what I do for you as your friend is remind you who you are and tell you how much I love you. And this isn't any kind of burden for me, because I love who you are very much. Every time I remind you, I get to remember with you, which is my pleasure.
explicacao: Citação de James Lecesne sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “This is how it works. I love the people in my life, and I do for my friends whatever they need me…” articula reflexao, amizade, again em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
